name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: ❗ Ohio's new abortion ban
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c769f/24c69fd9/2aab132/18ef98ed/1106659523/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all&source=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all")
---

Peter,

The legislature in my home state of Ohio just passed a law banning abortion after _six weeks_ -- with no exception for survivors of rape or incest.

This is as extreme as abortion bans get. Many women don't find out they're pregnant until they're further along than six weeks, so this bill would leave them unable to access abortion services at all.

And the only reason it passed is because Republicans control both chambers of the Ohio state legislature. That's why Ohio's a priority for EMILY's List in 2018.

**[Donate $3 today so that we can recruit pro-choice Democratic women to run in Ohio-- and anywhere else Republicans try to ban abortion.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c769f/24c69fd9/2aab132/18ef98ee/1106659523/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+today+so+that+we+can+recruit+pr&utm_campaign=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all&source=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all")**

The Supreme Court has already struck down a similar abortion ban that North Dakota passed a few years ago, and another was passed and struck down in Arkansas too.

But thanks to Donald Trump's victory, Republicans in Ohio were emboldened to move their extreme bill forward during the lame duck session.

Their hope is that the legislation will be challenged and end up before the Supreme Court, where there's still an open seat. Senate Republicans have obstructed President Obama's nominee for _nine months_ , so it looks like Trump will get to pick the next justice.

And he's promised to appoint anti-choice ones.

Republicans across the country are taking Donald Trump's win as an opportunity to step up their attacks on choice and abortion rights. Now more than ever we need to make sure we have pro-choice Democratic women running against them wherever and whenever we can.

Some say, "As Ohio goes, so goes the nation." But we can't let this be the new normal. Ohio's extreme and unconstitutional move puts women and families at risk.

**Donate $3 now to defeat extreme anti-choice Republicans like those in Ohio and stop the abortion bans:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Ohio-And-Beyond](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c769f/24c69fd9/2aab132/18ef98ef/1106659523/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOhioAndBeyond&utm_campaign=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all&source=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c769f/24c69fd9/2aab132/18ef98e8/1106659523/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161208_email_OHheartbeat?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all&source=WPEFEX08N_digital_email_20161208_OHheartbeat_n-all")

name: Tyler Foote
subject: Save the Date! AFP 2017 Lobby Day
body:
Peter, - This past month assumptions were overturned and politicians learned that voters are still the boss. Thats true in Washington, DC, but also in Richmond, VA. Voters can change government, and that includes you.
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter - one thing that politicians learned last month is that voters are still the boss. That's true in Washington, DC, but also in Richmond. Voters can change government, and that includes you.[ ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b9282265aace06c8776260373f6fb24be0d6edb2f1680ebf2d7531f9da325c4d298ee6c4)Next year Virginians have a huge opportunity to advance limited government, low taxes, and economic freedom. Peter, we can reverse Governor McAuliffe's status quo of tax, spend, and over-regulate. And it all starts in Richmond at our [2017 Lobby Day](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b9282265cda75b55883c88f12be8e0f13e4e140cd2e50ba2ea7190b92051b62afebe42c3 "2017 Lobby Day").
Will you join us?
**2017 AFP Lobby Day **Building the Path to Prosperity in Virginia ****Monday, January 16th (MLK Holiday) ****9 AM to 2 PM ****Hilton Garden Inn ****501 E Broad Street in Richmond __Speakers to be announced soon! __**[RSVP today](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b92822652343b85f7a725f069047e16b6fad9a181b1e6582bdb2e2b07f99725f38b43f6f "RSVP today") **
Our 2017 Lobby Day is an opportunity to have your voice heard. We will meet with lawmakers, hear from policy leaders, and meet fellow advocates for economic freedom from across the state.

You don't have to be an experienced policy advocate to be successful: AFP will train you, provide handouts and talking points, and set up all meetings. We even provide _free_ transportation to Richmond and lunch!

We will announce more details next week, including the names of our speakers. Please [RSVP today](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b92822652343b85f7a725f069047e16b6fad9a181b1e6582bdb2e2b07f99725f38b43f6f "RSVP today") and let me know if you have any questions.

Our Commonwealth's future is in our hands. Don't miss the opportunity to make a difference and [Build the Path to Prosperity](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b9282265691afa21ce1e395abba9ff4f0b40317840b1891ff4fabc20083d9c0267541e06 "Build the Path to Prosperity").

Sincerely,

Tyler Foote
Virginia State Director
Americans for Prosperity

P.S. Remember that elections matter, but they aren't enough. We have to remind politicians that we are watching, and expect them to do the right thing. [Joining us ](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b9282265a9ea89f060917471bdeaa9207c642d0b7a8cac66f67937f0c66592dcba84c5db "Joining us") for Lobby Day is your opportunity to tell your state leaders that [you are watching](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b92822653431de9c8943c817cc935a77af95905aa41f8c5e2a0eb5ab389e9c3809a5984c "you are watching") \- and will hold them accountable.[****](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=64f1fc71b9282265fd31b6eb63521822f2deb23a6c48f2953c49ba4fabc5ab7a143e43da90709ab4)
---

I wanted to make sure you saw what Bernie Sanders said while taking a stand to protect Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. Take a look and join him in fighting back... [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eedd/2b07114c/40726b9f/7368fcfa/517831394/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/fight-back-with-bernie?source=PT-20161209-Matt_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- I wanted to make sure you saw Senator Bernie Sanders' inspiring message.

We know Republicans are waging a war on seniors -- dead set on upending Social Security, slashing Medicaid, and ending Medicare as we know it. Now Democrats need our help to defend these programs before it's too late.

Check out what Sen. Sanders said, then **[add your name before midnight](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954eedd/2b07114c/40726b9f/7368fcfa/517831394/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/fight-back-with-bernie?source=PT-20161209-Matt_DS-ProsHV") **to join him -- and the nearly 20,000 grassroots Democrats who have already signed -- in fighting back.

Thanks for joining Bernie,
Matt Kehres
Digital Director, DSCC

USA THANK YOU TOUR 2016 THIS TUESDAY IN WI!
| Dear Peter,

Join President-Elect Donald J. Trump and Vice President-Elect Mike Pence for the USA Thank You Tour 2016 in West Allis, WI **Tues****day, Dec. 13th at 7:00 PM**! [Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fwest-allis-wi2%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_1213s&n=3 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/west-allis-wi2/"). ******Tues****day, Dec. 13th** : West Allis, WI
****Wisconsin State Fair Exposition Center
8200 W. Greenfield Av
West Allis, WI 53214

Doors Open: 4:00 PM
Event Begins: 7:00 PM
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fwest-allis-wi2%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_1213s&n=4 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/west-allis-wi2/").
_

_ Please limit personal items and arrive early to expedite entrance into the venue - please note, **NO homemade signs, banners, professional cameras with a detachable lens, tripods, monopods, selfie sticks, back packs or large bags will be permitted into the venue.**

We hope to see you on Tuesday!

Limited-Edition USA Thank You Tour 2016 merchandise will be sold at this event. For the holidays, get your MAGA gear [here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wallis_wi_1213s&n=5 "https://shop.donaldjtrump.com/"). Sincerely,

Team Trump–Pence
